questions: how to take care of a dog
answers: Best beginner pets: cats (independent), fish (low maintenance), or a small dog breed like Beagle or Pomeranian. Research before adopting!
Dog care basics: regular walks, balanced diet, fresh water always, annual vet checkups, and lots of love and attention. Dogs need routine!
Cat care: clean litter box daily, provide scratching posts, feed quality cat food, keep fresh water, and give them space when they need it.
Before getting a pet, consider: do you have time, space, and budget? Pets need food, vet visits, and daily attention. It's a long-term commitment!
